payload.answer: Brain DB remains the source of truth; Cognee is the rebuildable projection; Slack is the strict intake agent. Telegram addition is optional and pending strategy; determine cheapest model that saturates performance to optimize cost-perf. Keep open questions unresolved until evaluation.
payload.decision: Maintain Brain DB as source of truth; treat Cognee as rebuildable semantic projection; designate Slack as strict memory intake agent. Consider Telegram as a potential future addition; perform cost-performance analysis to identify cheapest model that saturates performance. Preserve ambiguity where unresolved.

entity_resolution.reason: No concrete updates to bind new entities; existing entities remain with current roles.

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection.
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent.
Open questions: Should Telegram be added later? Which model is cheapest while saturating performance?

repair_options: Schedule cost-perf benchmarking across candidate models; document saturation point.
Define Telegram integration criteria (data formats, privacy, latency) for future deployment.
Implement guardrails to prevent superseding Brain DB with lower-trust memory sources.
